trending_videos.title: Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer LEAK Explained | Sneak Peek
trending_videos.description:
HOW, exactly, do Spider-Man trailers leak? We brought in an expert to explain!

The Spider-Man Brand New Day trailer leaked in the past week, ahead of it’s planned release on Wednesday, June 17, 2026. In this episode of The Sneak Peek on New Rockstars, hosts Erik Voss and Jessica Clemons bring on a past assistant editor at trailer editing companies, Abby Freel, to explain the inside process of how big movie trailers are edited, how many people are involved, and why this happens to Sony for the Spider-Man Brand New Day second trailer, and not for the highly anticipated Avengers Doomsday trailer from Marvel Studios / Disney!

NEW ROCKSTARS NETWORK

trending_videos.title: Brawlhalla x DreamWorks Animation Shrek - Official Crossover Event Announcement Trailer
trending_videos.description: Take a look at the announcement trailer for Brawlhalla  x DreamWorks Animation’s Shrek crossover event. Ubisoft, in collaboration with Universal Products & Experiences, announced the crossover event launching on July 29. This collaboration brings the films’ unforgettable characters—Shrek, Fiona, and Puss in Boots—from the beloved franchise to  Brawlhalla as playable characters, with Donkey as a Companion. The event will also include a Map featuring Shrek’s iconic Swamp and other items inspired by fairy tale creatures. Additional details on the crossover and those other Items will be shared at a later date. The Brawlhalla  x Shrek crossover event is launching on July 29.
tags: Brawlhalla x DreamWorks Animation Shrek game trailer

Black Ops 7 Zombies DLC 4 Map Official Reveal: Kowakujō. This collaboration brings the films’ unforgettable characters—Shrek, Fiona, and Puss in Boots—from the beloved franchise to  Brawlhalla as playable characters, with Donkey as a Companion.
